recommendations.title: Search Party
recommendations.overview: Two oafs must rescue their stranded pal in Mexico.

recommendations.title: Plan B
recommendations.overview: After a regrettable first sexual encounter, a straight-laced high school student and her slacker best friend have 24 hours to hunt down a Plan B pill in America's heartland.

recommendations.title: The Legend of La Llorona
recommendations.overview: While vacationing in Mexico, a couple discovers their son's disappearance is tied to a supernatural curse.

recommendations.title: Return
recommendations.overview: A young couple purchase their new home to start a life together, only to find out the elderly couple next door have other plans for them.

recommendations.title: Before Midnight
recommendations.overview: It has been nine years since we last met Jesse and Celine, the French-American couple who once met on a train in Vienna. They now live in Paris with twin daughters but have spent a summer in Greece at the invitation of an author colleague of Jesse's.

recommendations.title: Qué León
recommendations.overview: A love story between a couple with the same last name but very different social statuses.

recommendations.title: The One I Love
recommendations.overview: Ethan and Sophie are a married couple on the brink of separation when, at the urging of their therapist, they decide to salvage their relationship by escaping to a beautiful vacation house for the weekend.

recommendations.title: Welcome Home
recommendations.overview: A couple try to repair their damaged union in an Italian vacation paradise. Then they discover the owner's intentions.

recommendations.title: Better Living Through Chemistry
recommendations.overview: A straight-laced pharmacist's uneventful life spirals out of control when he starts an affair with a trophy wife customer who takes him on a joyride involving sex, drugs and possibly murder.

recommendations.title: Corner Office
recommendations.overview: In this office satire, Orson, a straight-laced employee, retreats to a blissfully empty corner office to get away from his lackluster colleagues. But why does this seem to upset them so much?
